Differences Between Fact and Common Fiction

full_text:
Wang Lang (Jingxing) 王朗 (景興)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Lang (王朗), styledJingxing (景興), was born in Donghai commandery. Originally the prefect of Kuaiji, he later joined Wei and became a high-ranking minister. Wang Lang was affiliated with the Han Dynasty, Tao Qian, and the Wei Kingdom. Wang Lang lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
